conversation_log.summary: Task fits within current architecture. Zod schemas in @cv-tool/contracts (camelCase + Schema suffix), oRPC procedure in apps/backend/ (camelCase naming), Kysely query via db.selectFrom().selectAll().execute(), output schema enforcement, re-exports from contracts entry point, no cross-app imports — all consistent with docs/arch/backend.md, architecture.md naming conventions, and ADR-011 (PR #60, pending merge). Notes: (1) Testing architecture (docs/arch/testing.md) is currently undefined — the developer must choose a test runner (recommend Vitest for consistency with Vite toolchain) and establish file conventions; a separate architectural task should formalise this. (2) The Zod schema specifies a 'role' field (criterion 1) but task #61 defines the employees table with 'email' instead of 'role' — this is a requirements-level discrepancy that the Requirements Specialist should reconcile before development begins.
